moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th edition of The Championships, Wimbledon, the world's most prestigious tennis tournament, begins on Monday, June 29, 2026, at the All England Club in London, running for two weeks.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first aces tomorrow. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: London Local Angle
angles.copy: The eyes of the sporting world turn to SW19! Wimbledon kicks off its two-week run tomorrow, bringing all the tennis drama to our doorstep. Are you heading down?

moments.title: Tour de France Grand Départ
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on Friday, July 4, 2026, with the Grand Départ taking place in Barcelona, Spain, before three weeks of gruelling racing.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels is almost here! The Tour de France kicks off on Friday from Barcelona. Get ready for three weeks of epic cycling.

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: Just six days until the peloton rolls out! Who's your pick for the Yellow Jersey at this year's Tour de France?

moments.title: UK Singles Chart No.1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for a 14th non-consecutive week, as announced on Friday, June 26, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is Number 1 on the Official UK Singles Chart for a massive 14th week. What a track!

angles.name: Artist Focus
angles.copy: Another week, another Number 1 for Sam Fender and Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' continues its incredible run at the top of the charts. Are you loving it?

moments.title: Happy 48th, Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls and The X Factor, celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29, 2026.

angles.name: Pussycat Dolls Tribute
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish you had a birthday like this? Happy 48th Birthday tomorrow to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track?

angles.name: X Factor Memories
angles.copy: From pop superstar to X Factor judge! Wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday to Nicole Scherzinger tomorrow. What's your top Nicole moment?

moments.title: Happy 73rd, Colin Hay
moments.blurb: Scottish-Australian musician Colin Hay, best known as the lead vocalist of the band Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on June 29, 2026.

angles.name: Men at Work Classic
angles.copy: Can you hear that? It's the sound of a birthday celebration! Happy 73rd Birthday tomorrow to the legendary Colin Hay of Men at Work!

angles.name: Solo & Band
angles.copy: From 'Down Under' to a successful solo career, wishing Colin Hay a very Happy 73rd Birthday tomorrow! What's your favourite track from the Men at Work frontman?

moments.title: Happy 55th, Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking American rapper, singer, songwriter, and record producer Missy 'Misdemeanor' Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Wishing a massive Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott on Wednesday! An absolute icon of hip-hop.

angles.name: Producer & Performer
angles.copy: From 'Supa Dupa Fly' to a legendary producer, Missy Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday! What's your favourite Missy track or collaboration?

moments.title: Happy 31st, Post Malone
moments.blurb: American singer, rapper, songwriter, and record producer Post Malone, known for blending genres, celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone on Saturday! From 'White Iverson' to 'Circles', he keeps us guessing. What's your favourite Posty tune?

angles.name: Modern Hitmaker
angles.copy: He's only 31 on Saturday, but he's already given us so many hits! Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Post Malone. Which of his tracks is on your playlist?

moments.title: Happy 57th, RZA
moments.blurb: Robert Fitzgerald Diggs, better known as RZA, the de facto leader and producer of the iconic hip-hop group Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5, 2026.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Legend
angles.copy: Protect Ya Neck and wish a Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary RZA from Wu-Tang Clan on Sunday! An absolute powerhouse in hip-hop.

angles.name: Producer Genius
angles.copy: The Abbot turns 57 on Sunday! Happy Birthday to RZA, the mastermind behind so much of the Wu-Tang Clan's iconic sound. What's your favourite Wu-Tang track?

moments.title: Happy 51st, 50 Cent
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman Curtis James Jackson III, professionally known as 50 Cent, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6, 2026.

angles.name: Rap Superstar
angles.copy: Go Shorty, it's your birthday! Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent on Monday! What's your favourite track from the 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' star?

angles.name: Iconic Hits
angles.copy: From 'In Da Club' to 'Candy Shop', 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday! Celebrate his birthday by cranking up your favourite G-Unit era anthem.

moments.title: Happy 86th, Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, better known as Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr on Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on vocals?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: From the back of the Fab Four to a successful solo career, Happy 86th Birthday to Ringo Starr on Tuesday! A true drumming icon.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin in Parts of UK
moments.blurb: The summer school holidays officially begin for many pupils across Northern Ireland from July 1, 2026, marking the start of the long break, with other regions following later in July.

angles.name: Holiday Kick-off
angles.copy: The countdown is over for many! Summer holidays officially begin for some schools in the UK this week. What are your big summer plans?

angles.name: Local Angle (Wales)
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Pupils across parts of Wales are starting their summer holidays this week. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Local Angle (Devon)
angles.copy: While some are already off, the anticipation is building! Summer holidays begin for many across the UK this week. What's top of your Devon summer bucket list?
